label_source: Layer-1 resolve pattern cmp,vp,vpc,naive = W,L,W,L (cmplog AND value_profile_cmplog resolve; value_profile AND naive block) => i2s-PRO single-technique literal-substitution family. The evidence test verifies this independently (G2): it measures the cmplog corpus's byte-frequency enrichment in the gate's target literal, NOT the resolve pattern that defined the shape.

hypotheses.label: cmplog (I2S) substitutes a logged CMP literal at a fixed gate offset, so its corpus is enriched in the target value at that offset relative to naive; value_profile/naive cannot synthesize the exact literal

params.applies_to_signatures: operand_kind in {multibyte_literal, single_byte_constant, enum_or_code} AND byte_signature == contiguous_literal AND gate_structure in {equality, switch_case, presence_or_nonnull, length_or_count_check, inequality_or_range}
params.note: lcms/libpng/libxml2/bloaty have no on-disk corpus (data_realities) -> tool returns no_corpus, arbiter leaves those branches inconclusive for this hypothesis

hypotheses.prediction: For a fixed-offset literal value gate, the cmplog corpus is ENRICHED in the target literal at the gate offset relative to naive: signed_target_enrich > 0 (i2s-PRO direction). A pure-coverage / value-profile-only mechanism predicts NO cmplog-specific enrichment at the operand offset (signed_target_enrich ~ 0), because without I2S operand substitution cmplog's corpus byte distribution at that offset would match naive's. This is the alternative the test rules out.
hypotheses.g1_falsifiable_by: signed_target_enrich <= 0 (cmplog NOT enriched, or depleted, in the target literal at the gate offset) refutes i2s-PRO substitution at this gate.
hypotheses.g2_independence: Measures corpus byte-frequency at the operand offset (a property of saved seeds), not whether vpc/cmplog resolved the branch. Independent of the Layer-1 resolve pattern.

hypotheses.label: I2S assembles two or more co-dependent, dispersed CMP literals (URL scheme+port+HTTP tokens; cookie/header chains; deep multi-field ICC structure) whose accumulated downstream program state, not the substitution point itself, controls the blocked branch

params.applies_to_signatures: byte_signature == dispersed_multibyte AND (gate_structure in {state_or_grammar, presence_or_nonnull} OR operand_kind in {none_structural, derived_integer})
params.proposed_descriptor: corpus_queue:value_enrichment:any_of_a_token_set:per_branch -- for a branch with NO single fixed gate offset, score the MAX per-token cmplog-vs-naive enrichment over the set of recoverable anchor literals named in the analysis (e.g. 'HTTP/', 'Set-Cookie', 'Content-Type', scheme/port tokens). Reduces to operand_enrichment when exactly one contiguous anchor token exists at a fixed offset.
params.build_caveat: NOT yet in tool_registry.json. operand_enrichment is offset-anchored and per data_realities returns no_gate_signature on dispersed/structural-assembly gates with different-sized W/L seeds; a multi-token, offset-agnostic enrichment scan must be built before this hypothesis is decidable. Until built, this hypothesis is UNDECIDABLE and the arbiter must fall through to inconclusive.

hypotheses.prediction: If accumulated state is driven by I2S literal assembly, the cmplog corpus is enriched in AT LEAST ONE of the branch's named anchor tokens relative to naive: any_anchor_token_enrich > 0. An alternative where value_profile's gradient (not I2S) assembles the scaffold predicts no cmplog-specific token enrichment.
hypotheses.g1_falsifiable_by: any_anchor_token_enrich <= 0 for every named anchor token refutes I2S-driven scaffold assembly.
hypotheses.g2_independence: Token-frequency over saved corpora, independent of the resolve pattern.

merges: Collapsed all 106 signatures' open mechanism_summary text -- every one describes I2SRandReplace substituting a logged CMP operand -- into ONE technique-effect (I2S literal substitution). Kept only the TWO subtypes a measurement can separate: (A) fixed-offset value gate (the branch IS the value-compare; contiguous_literal at a recoverable offset) vs (B) accumulated-state/dispersed-literal gate (the branch sits downstream of a multi-literal scaffold; dispersed_multibyte, none_structural/derived_integer operands, state_or_grammar gates).

Did NOT split A further by gate_structure (equality vs switch_case vs presence_or_nonnull vs length/inequality) or by literal kind (FOURCC vs magic vs short string vs enum vs single byte): operand_enrichment treats all of them identically as a fixed-offset value gate, so the data cannot discriminate those sub-flavors -- they are one hypothesis.

Did NOT adopt joint_necessity: that tool targets the JOINT vpc-needs-BOTH assembly-depth subtype (vpc resolves where cmplog-alone blocks). This shape is i2s-PRO single-technique -- cmplog resolves ALONE (W in slot 0) -- so the joint-necessity assembly-depth mechanism is by construction absent and that descriptor does not apply.
data_reality_caveats: On-disk corpora exist ONLY for curl/harfbuzz/openthread (+sqlite3, none here) -- 35 of 106 branches (lcms 26 + libpng 6 + libxml2 1 + bloaty 2) cannot be enrichment-scored and fall to inconclusive regardless of hypothesis. Roughly 71 branches (curl 37 + harfbuzz 33 + openthread 1) are scorable.

Hypothesis A is the LOAD-BEARING test: it reuses the validated operand_enrichment tool (descriptor corpus_queue:byte_freq_ratio:target_vs_decoy:per_gate_offset, anchor harfbuzz/5391, pro median +3.12) on contiguous-literal fixed-offset gates -- which is most of harfbuzz (FOURCC tags) and many curl literals (Content-Type, 127.0.0.1, HTTP/2, attachment). Of the corpus-scorable branches, the harfbuzz FOURCC gates and curl contiguous-literal gates are A; most curl URL/cookie/header branches are dispersed_multibyte B.

Hypothesis B rests on a NOT-YET-BUILT multi-token offset-agnostic enrichment descriptor: operand_enrichment is offset-anchored and per data_realities returns no_gate_signature on dispersed/structural gates with different-sized W/L seeds. Until that descriptor is built and registered, B is UNDECIDABLE and its branches (dispersed_multibyte accumulated-state, mostly curl) fall through to inconclusive. This is an honest 'no clean test built yet', NOT a claim the mechanism is absent.

I2S is untagged in mutation_op and value_profile is a feedback (not a mutator), so NO seed_lineage:event_cooccurrence 'I2S event' or 'VP gradient event' descriptor was proposed (data_realities forbid them). Both hypotheses verify via corpus byte/token frequency only.
